name: tiktok-fixture
description: TikTok — BLOCKED. X-Bogus/X-Gnarly custom signing prevents API replay. Core content (search, video detail, user profile) served via SSR __UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__, not API. Needs L3 adapter with browser_fetch transport.
blocked_reason: X-Bogus/X-Gnarly custom signing (client-side computed anti-bot signatures) + SSR-only content delivery
